_setup: Local setup for Supabase MCP server in Claude Code.
1. Create a Personal Access Token: https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens (name it e.g. 'claude-code-local').
2. Find your project_ref in the dashboard URL: https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/<PROJECT_REF>.
3. Add the following exports to ~/.zshrc (or ~/.bashrc) and run 'source ~/.zshrc':
4. Copy this file to .mcp.json (it is gitignored): cp .mcp.example.json .mcp.json

5. Restart Claude Code. On first start the server exposes mcp__supabase__authenticate — call it, open the URL in a browser, pick the organization that owns your project, and finish the OAuth flow. Tools become available automatically.

Notes: read_only=false enables DDL/migrations. Destructive ops still require explicit chat confirmation per CLAUDE.md. The Bearer PAT in headers is the initial credential; the OAuth grant supersedes it for subsequent calls.
